items.title: Parse --> markers and plain text lines in proposal-to-backlog
items.description: Core pipeline code in proposal-to-backlog.ts directly affects how raw proposals are ingested into the backlog. A parsing bug here corrupts every downstream item — sprint generation, cost estimation, and execution all depend on clean backlog items. Fixing this first unblocks item ranked 2, which lives in the same file.

items.title: Exclude --> delimiter from parsed proposal content
items.description: Same file as rank-1; this is the complementary fix ensuring the --> token is stripped from extracted content rather than included as literal text in the proposal body. Both fixes together restore correct end-to-end parsing; neither is fully useful without the other. Depends on rank-1 to avoid redundant context-switching overhead.

items.title: Add one-sentence autonomous loop description to smoke-test spec
items.description: Minimal-effort, high-confidence doc task. A single sentence in the smoke-test spec improves onboarding clarity and reduces future ambiguity about what the smoke test covers. Low risk, fast to verify, no code changes.

items.title: Document autonomous loop planning, execution, testing, commit, and PR flow
items.description: Valuable architectural documentation describing the full autonomous loop lifecycle (plan → execute → test → commit → PR). However, the TODO sits inside a plans document at line 2542, suggesting it is large and context-heavy. Risk of scope creep is higher than the other items. Ranked last because the code fixes (ranks 1-2) are prerequisites for the loop to run correctly, and the spec doc (rank 3) is cheaper to close first.
